action_set_definitions.name: query_fleet_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time status for specific vehicles, including their current route, location index, and delay magnitude.

vehicle_ids.description: List of vehicle identifiers to check (e.g., ['Train 505', 'Bus 99']).

action_set_definitions.name: get_regulatory_constraints
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the mandatory safety and labor regulations applicable to a specific vehicle or hub, such as maximum hold times and driver rest requirements.

vehicle_id.description: The ID of the vehicle to check constraints for.

action_set_definitions.name: check_operational_barriers
action_set_definitions.description: Scans for active disruptions (road closures, mechanical failures) that might prevent a vehicle from safely holding or departing.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_transfer_protection_hold
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a hold order on a distributor vehicle to wait for a feeder vehicle.

vehicle_id.description: The ID of the vehicle to be held.

action_set_definitions.name: resolve_labor_barrier
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts crew assignments or extends labor shifts to authorize a hold that would otherwise violate labor standards.

action_set_definitions.name: authorize_departure
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the recovery process and issues the legal clearance for the vehicle to depart from the hub.

state_description.system_time: Current simulation time in minutes from the start of the service day (e.g., 480 for 08:00 AM).
state_description.fleet_status: A list of objects containing vehicle_id, current_route, current_stop_index, and current_delay in minutes.
state_description.active_disruptions: List of current incidents (e.g., road closures, mechanical failures) affecting specific segments or vehicles.
state_description.schedule_adherence_matrix: A mapping of Trip IDs to their deviation from the planned timetable (positive for delays, negative for early arrivals).
state_description.passenger_load_data: Estimated passenger counts per vehicle and station to calculate the impact of delays.
